title: neopieris nitida
intro: Neopieris nitida, also known as the Japanese pepper or Japanese prickly ash, is a flowering plant native to Japan and China. It is a type of evergreen shrub that belongs to the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the citrus or rue family. The plant's medicinal properties include its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve indigestion, and act as a natural anti-inflammatory agent. Neopieris nitida can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are said to provide various health benefits, including improved circulation, reduced stress, and enhanced immune function.
